settings.tagline: India's Devotional, Folk & Rasiya Music Label
settings.description: Bainsla Music Private Limited is India's leading Devotional, Folk & Rasiya music label dedicated to preserving and promoting Indian cultural music.
settings.about_text: Under the visionary leadership of Ajeet Bainsla, our company specializes in Devotional Bhajans, Gurjar Rasiya, Folk Songs and Digital Music Distribution across 150+ platforms worldwide. With 256+ songs, 42+ artists, and millions of views across platforms, we are committed to bringing the finest devotional and folk music to audiences globally.
settings.address:
Bainsla Music Private Limited
Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
